author: Ivan Verbovoy
name: Progressive Depth 4-Hour: Depth Recurrence Scaling Study
blurb: 4-hour unlimited compute run exploring how depth recurrence scales. 3 shared blocks, progressive depth 2→3→4→5 repeats (15 effective layers), 132K steps, 38 SWA checkpoints, Hedge Mixer eval. First data point on depth recurrence scaling with compute.
